MOTION CALENDAR ON 10/18/07 IN 206, PLAINTIF'S (PLF) MOTION FOR PREFERENTIAL TRIAL SETTING IS GRANTED PURSUANT TO CCP 36(D). THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 2/4/08 @ 11:15AM IN DEPT. 206; SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET IN DEPT. 220. PLF TO CONTACT DEPT. 220 FOR HEARING DATE AND GIVE NOTICE TO ALL PARTIES. DISCOVERY IS OPEN UNTIL THE CASE IS ASSIGNED TO A TRIAL COURT. G.O. 140 RE: MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT WAS STIPULATED TO. PLF TO PRODUCE BANKRUPTCY PETITIONS WITHIN 10 DAYS. PLF'S DEPOSITION SHALL BE SCHEDULED WITHIN 10 DAYS AND COMMENCED BY THE END OF NOVEMBER. PARTIES TO COOPERATE ON OUT OF STATE COMMISSIONS. DEFENDANTS MAY OBTAIN HALF OF AVAILABLE SAMPLES OF BLOCKS OR SLIDES FOR DESTRUCTIVE TESTING. ALL PATHOLOGY PROVIDED BY 10/22/07. PLF SHALL DISCLOSE ALL PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AND CAUSATION WITNESSES AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY 11/16/07, AND SHALL ALSO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS THEY INTEND TO USE AT TRIAL AS TO PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY THAT DATE. IF PLF LEARNS OF NEW WITNESSES, IN GOOD FAITH, THEY SHALL IMMEDIATELY BE DISCLOSED ALONG WITH DECLARATION AS TO WHY THIS DISCLOSURE WAS NOT PROVIDED ON THE DUE DATE. DEFENDANTS TO PROVIDE INFORMATION REGARDING PROPOSITION 51 WITNESSES AND AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES BY 11/30/07. IF DEFENDANTS LEARNS OF NEW WITNESSES, IN GOOD FAITH, THEY SHALL IMMEDIATELY BE DISCLOSED ALONG WITH DECLARATION AS TO WHY THIS DISCLOSURE WAS NOT PROVIDED ON THE DUE DATE. ALL ECONOMIC EXPERT DISCOVERY IS TO BE COMPLETED 14 CALENDAR DAYS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE, INCLUDING DEPOSITION OF ECONOMIC EXPERT. THE PARED-DOWN LIST OF EXPERTS WILL BE FAXED NO LATER THAN 14 DAYS BEFORE TRIAL DATE. NO LATER THAN 12 DAYS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE, EACH SIDE MAY IDENTIFY UP TO THREE EXPERT WITNESSES PERCEIVED TO BE NECESSARY TO BE DEPOSED FOR MEANINGFUL SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS TO OCCUR. THESE EXPERTS WILL BE DEPOSED PRIOR TO THE TRIAL DATE. TRIAL WILL NOT BE DELAYED FOR THE PURPOSE OF DEPOSING EXPERTS. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: WISS, CLK: DLOK, REPORTER: SUSAN LEE, #4280

Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses To Defendant Union Carbide Corporation¿S Special Interrogatories Propounded To Joan Mahoney; Request For Sanctions In The Amount Of $1,440.00
Off Calendar Jan-24-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Union Carbide's motion to compel further responses to special interrogatories as to plaintiff Joan Mahoney is Granted, except as to interrogatories 19-22 as the motion is moot. The objections are overruled and stricken. In addition, the preliminary statement and reservation of the right to amend responses is stricken. Plaintiff is ordered to serve verified supplemental responses within 15 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $240 shall be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.
